title: zehneria scabra
intro: Zehneria scabra is a plant species that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Zehneria scabra include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Zehneria scabra is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and ointments.
